question: The Caterpillar Inc. has found that 80% of its new management hires are meeting expectations in selling their new line of backhoe loader, while 20% are not. Of the satisfactory hires, 75% had sales experience, while of the unsatisfactory hires, 55% had sales experience. What is the probability that a new hire with sales experience will meet expectations?

At a local pet adoption center of dogs and cats, it known that if a person adopts a dog or a cat, there is 0.45 probability that it is a cat and 0.55 probability that it is a dog. If a cat is adopted, the probability that it is a female is 0.6 and if a dog is adopted, the probability that it is female is 0.35. If a pet is selected at random such that is found to be a male, what is the probability that it is a dog?

Three urns contain 6 red, 4 black; 4 red, 6 black, and 5 red, 5 black balls respectively. One of the urns is selected at random and a ball is drawn from it. If the ball drawn is red, find the probability that it is drawn from the first urn.

Sunlife insurance company insured 2000 motorbike drivers, 4000 car drivers, and 6000 truck drivers. The probability of an accident involving a motorbike driver, car driver, and a truck is 0.01, 0.03, and 0.015 respectively. One of the insured persons meets with an accident. What is the probability that he is a motorbike driver?

In a bolt factory, three machines M1, M2 and M3 manufacture 2000, 2500, and 4000 bolts every day. Of their output 3%, 4%, and 2.5% are defective bolts. One of the bolts is drawn very randomly from a day's production and is found to be defective. What is the probability that it was produced by machine M2?

SM Malls buy 50% of its appliances from Manufacturer A, 30% from Manufacturer B, and 20% from Manufacturer C. It is estimated that 6% of Manufacturer A's appliances, 5% of Manufacturer B's appliances, and 4% of Manufacturer C's appliances need repair before the warranty expires. An appliance is chosen at random. If the appliance chosen needed repair before the warranty expired, what is the probability that the appliance was manufactured by Manufacturer A?

Suppose 36% of families own a dog, 30% of families own a cat, and 22% of the families that have a dog also have a cat. A family is chosen at random and found to have a cat. What is the probability they also own a dog?

Suppose 30% of the women in an engineering class received an A on the test and 25% of the men received an A. The class is 60% women. Given that a person chosen at random received an A, what is the probability this person is a woman?

Colorblindness is a sex-linked condition, and 5% of men and 0.25% of women are color blind. The population of the Philippines is 51% female. What is the probability that a color-blind Filipino is a man?

Two factories in Cebu City supply light bulbs to the city government. Bulbs from factory X work for over 5000 hours in 99% of cases whereas bulbs from factory Y work for over 5000 hours in 95% of cases. It is known that factory X supplies 60% of the total bulbs available in the market. Given that a light bulb works for more than 5000 hours, what is the probability that it was supplied by factory Y?
A fair dice is tossed six times. What is the probability that more than four times it will show an even number?

The average national passing rate in the Electrical Engineering board exam from 2019-2023 are 45.6%, 33.2%, 64.7%, 54.3% and 37.8%. What is the probability that the national passing rate in 2024 will be more than 60% in REELE?
The production of detergents by ACS shows that on the average 2 out of 10 detergent packs are off-spec. What is the probability that out of 100 packs, less than 10 will be off-spec?
How many 4 digit number can be formed without repeating any digit, from the following digit 1,2,3,4 and 6.
How many ways can 3 men and 4 women be seated on a bench if the women to be together?
A dice is rolled 9 times. Find the probability of having a 'THREE' 2 times?
In problem no. 16, find the probability of having 'THREE' more than 5 times:

Concrete blocks are tested and it is found that, on average, 7% fail to meet the required specification. For a batch of 9 blocks, determine the probabilities that 2 or less blocks will fail to meet the specification.
A manufacturer estimates that 3% of his output of a small item is defective. Find the probabilities that in a sample of 10 items more than two items will be defective.
On the average, five out of 20 of cane stalks are rejected due to low juice content. What is the probability that out of 100 stalks in a truck more less than 19 will be rejected?

Petron Pilipinas estimates that 0.25% of their output of a component are defective. The components are marketed in packets of 200. Determine the probability of a packet containing less than three defective components.

The mean thickness of a spline from a mechanical shop is 23.67 mm with standard deviation of 2.42 mm. What is the probability that a spline will measure more than 22.78 mm considering tolerance offset?
How many 3-letter word can be generated from the word, STRESS?
How many ways can 4 letters, 4 numbers, 4 symbols, and 4 shapes be arranged in a 16-element code such that there is alternation?
In a 15-item true or false question test, what is the probability that you will get a raw score of more than 10?
Seven dice is tossed at once. What is the probability that at more than five will show an odd number?
A coin is tossed three times. What is the probability that at most 2 will be tails?
It is known that 2 out of 10 of the shafting in foundry shop will be off-spec. What is the probability that less than ten out of 75 shafts will be off-spec?
An urn contains 4 blue, 2 red and 3 black pens. If Shane drew 2 pens at once, what is the probability that it will be of same color?
Determine the sample variance of the following data: Range: 0-5 (Freq: 4), 5-10 (Freq: 11), 10-15 (Freq: 23), 15-20 (Freq: 8).
In problem no. 30, what is the probability that x > 14"?
In a toss of 5 dice, what is the probability that one will get at most 2 dice showing more than FOUR dots?
Four boys and 5 girls are chosen from a group of 8 boys and 9 girls to sit on a row of chairs. How many possible arrangements are there if the girls and boys are alternated?

In a water cooling plant, the average wet bulb temperature of air entering a cooling tower is 82 F and standard deviation of 1.35. What is the probability that in a given day, the air is at 82.8-83.5 F?
A box contains 3 blue, 4 reds, 5 yellow and 2 green balls. What is the probability that in a draw of three balls, all balls are of same color?
Compute the geometric mean of 13, 17, 18, 21 and 32
A card is drawn randomly form a poker standard deck. What is the probability that the card is a diamond or an ace card?
Three cards are drawn from a standard deck on a time. What is the probability that the first card is a face card, the second is a red card and the third is a black or a face card?

In a classroom, there are only eight chairs available so she can only choose four boys out of six and four girls out of five. How many ways can she arrange the students along the eight chairs if the boys and girls are alternated?

The probabilities of shots of each basketball players in NBA (2024 data) are as follows: Kyle Korver p=0.53, Stephen Curry p=0.68, DeAndre Jordan p=0.44. Determine the probability that in a single set of free throw, at most one will shoot?

The average number of acres burned by forest and range fires in Palawan is 4,300 acres per year, with a standard deviation of 750 acres. The distribution of the number of acres burned is normal. What is the probability that between 2,500 and 4,200 acres will be burned in any given year?
Rolling a dice three times, evaluate the probability of having at least one '6'.
From 3 boys and 5 girls, only 2 boys and 2 girls can seat on a row of fours chairs, what is the probability that any two girls are seated together?
Pepe tossed 7 coins simultaneously, what is the probability that he will get less than 3 heads?
Compute the harmonic mean of 13, 19, 18, 21 and 32

An ME student from TIP-Manila has test scores of 75, 83, and 78. The final test has a weight equal to one third of the total grade. What should the student strive for a minimum (integral) final score so that he gets a passing minimum average of 80.?
With a throw of 3 dice, what is the probability of getting a sum of 9 or 11?
Determine the number of permutations of 8 distinct objects taken 3 at a time?
A number between 1 and 10000 (inclusive) is randomly selected. What is the probability that it will be divisible both by 4 and 5?
Of 3500 college women enrolled, the personal records indicate that 250 are of heights exceeding 5'6". What is the probability that a randomly selected coed is of height not exceeding 5'6"?
